name: Name
select_hook:
Select a hook from the grid
to view or edit it.
select_command:
Select a command to edit it
across all hooks.
select_definition: Select a definition to edit it.
name_override_placeholder: leave blank to use definition name
saves_all: Saving updates this command in all {n} hooks.
cache_no_entries: No cache entries yet. Run githops check to populate.
no_flow: No configured hooks with commands to visualize.
flow_hint: Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom · Drag handles to add dependency · Select edge + Delete to remove
hook_desc.pre-commit: Runs before commit message editor; abort with non-zero exit.
hook_desc.prepare-commit-msg: Runs after default message is prepared, before editor starts.
hook_desc.commit-msg: Validates/normalises the commit message. Receives message file path as $1.
hook_desc.post-commit: Notification hook after a commit is made. Cannot affect outcome.
hook_desc.pre-merge-commit: Runs after merge completes, before merge commit is created.
hook_desc.post-merge: Notification hook after git-merge / git-pull. Cannot affect outcome.
hook_desc.pre-rebase: Runs before git-rebase; abort with non-zero exit.
hook_desc.post-rewrite: Runs after commits are rewritten (amend, rebase).
hook_desc.pre-push: Runs before git-push; abort with non-zero exit.
hook_desc.push-to-checkout: Overrides default behaviour when pushing to a checked-out branch.
hook_desc.pre-receive: Server-side: runs once before updating refs. Abort with non-zero exit.
hook_desc.update: Server-side: runs once per ref being updated.
hook_desc.proc-receive: Server-side: handles commands matched by receive.procReceiveRefs.
hook_desc.post-receive: Server-side: notification after all refs are updated.
hook_desc.post-update: Server-side: notification after all refs are updated (receives ref names).
hook_desc.applypatch-msg: Validates/normalises commit message from applied patch.
hook_desc.pre-applypatch: Runs after patch is applied but before committing.
hook_desc.post-applypatch: Notification after patch is applied and committed.
hook_desc.sendemail-validate: Validates patch emails before git-send-email sends them.
hook_desc.post-checkout: Runs after git-checkout or git-switch; receives old HEAD, new HEAD, branch flag.
hook_desc.pre-auto-gc: Runs before git gc --auto; abort with non-zero exit.
hook_desc.fsmonitor-watchman: Used with core.fsmonitor for filesystem change monitoring.
hook_desc.post-index-change: Runs after the index is written.
hook_desc.p4-prepare-changelist: git-p4 submit: runs before changelist editor starts.
hook_desc.p4-post-changelist: git-p4 submit: notification after successful submit.
hook_desc.p4-pre-submit: git-p4 submit: runs before submission; abort with non-zero exit.
